R
RFE Web Companion

No account? Switch to Register, or run rfe-agent adduser on the PC.

Uses the same one-time code as "Pair with code" — creates your account and pairs this browser together.

Token stored in this browser's localStorage — less secure than the phone app's Keystore. Only use trusted browsers.

Overview

—%

Disk
—%
New: quick actions row + live device cards replace the old static dashboard — every action is one click instead of a page hop.

Quick actions

Connected devices

Restart agent service

Interrupts active transfers; devices reconnect automatically.

Read-only mode

Block writes; browsing and downloads still work.

Max upload

MB/s, 0 = unlimited

Max download

MB/s, 0 = unlimited

Photo backup destination

Not set — phone photo backup will fail until you set a folder here.

Allowed folders

Phones can only browse the folders listed here. Managed from this web companion only.

0
Total devices
0
Active
0
Guests
0
Storage used

Pair a new device

Pair a new device

Mints a one-time code, same as `rfe-agent pair` on the PC. Admin sessions (logged in with the account password) only.

Guest device

Forces the new device read-only and jailed to a folder. Only an admin can change this later.

Code expires in

How long the one-time code stays valid before it must be regenerated.

Paired devices

Files

Open
0
Completed
0
Failed
0

Transfers

Users

Password-login accounts are managed from the host: rfe-agent adduser <name>. Devices paired by QR/code appear under Paired devices.

rfe-agent.service — journald
Level:
